use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH PHILADELPHIA CHROMOSOME-NEGATIVE(PH-) ACUTE LYMPHOBLASTIC LEUKEMIA (ALL) IN SECOND OR GREATER RELAPSE OR WHOSE DISEASE HAS PROGRESSED FOLLOWING TWO OR MORE ANTI-LEUKEMIA THERAPIES

indications.text:
1.1 Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia
Marqibo® is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Philadelphia chromosome-negative (Ph-) acute
lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) in second or greater relapse or whose disease has progressed following two or
more anti-leukemia therapies.
This indication is app...
